description: Sector overlay for Ghana payment service providers, e-money issuers, switches, payment aggregators, fintech platforms, and payment-service documentation.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Payment Platforms and Services. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Payment Systems and Services Act, 2019 (Act 987)
primary_sources.issuer: Bank of Ghana / Republic of Ghana

primary_sources.name: Bank of Ghana licensing and authorisation of payment service providers

rules.title: Bank of Ghana PSP licence or authorisation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Bank of Ghana payment service provider licence, e-money issuer authorisation, payment system licence, or approval evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Bank of Ghana PSP licensing notice

rules.title: Customer transparency, recourse, complaints, or dispute-resolution evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for fees disclosure, terms, complaints, dispute resolution, refund, reversal, customer recourse, or fair treatment controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: KYC, AML, transaction monitoring, or suspicious-activity controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for KYC, customer due diligence, transaction monitoring, beneficial owner, sanctions, suspicious transaction, or AML controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Payment-security, cybersecurity, or incident-response controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for information security, cybersecurity, incident response, fraud monitoring, encryption, access control, or audit logging evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
